macro-process.description: Cross-project process drivers and governance workflows.
macro-process.admission_policy: Allowed in core meta-repo when broadly reusable and stable.

macro-tool.description: Cross-project operational tools that improve delivery quality.
macro-tool.admission_policy: Allowed in core meta-repo when generic and not domain-locked.

micro-pack.admission_policy: Do not host as one-repo-per-skill in core; group into opt-in domain packs.
